title: Color Theme - Switching theme while Phone is set to Dark Theme
scenario: Color Theme selection (Follow Phone Theme, Light, Dark) does not apply immediately or persist across all app screens on Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on a phone set to Light Theme.
2. Go to Home → Account → Color Theme.
3. Verify the default selected option is 'Follow Phone Theme'.

5. Observe the app UI immediately switch to dark colors across all screens (Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, Account, DFU screens, Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, Onboardings).
6. Force close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Go to Home → Account → Color Theme and verify 'Dark Theme' is still selected and the UI remains in dark mode.
9. Observe the app UI immediately switch to light colors across all screens.
10. Force close and restart the app.
11. Go to Home → Account → Color Theme and verify 'Light Theme' is still selected and the UI remains in light mode.
13. Change the phone's system theme to Dark Theme.
14. Observe the app UI follow the phone's dark theme across all screens.
15. Change the phone's system theme back to Light Theme.
16. Observe the app UI follow the phone's light theme across all screens.
17. While 'Follow Phone Theme' is selected, tap it again and verify nothing happens (no UI change, no toast, no navigation).
18. While 'Dark Theme' is selected, tap it again and verify nothing happens.
19. While 'Light Theme' is selected, tap it again and verify nothing happens.
expected: The selected color theme is applied immediately across all app screens, persists between app restarts, and tapping the currently selected theme does nothing.
